examples: A waybill shall be submitted to the Customs by the postal service.
The invalidity or unenforceability of any provisions shall not affect any other part of this air waybill.
Clauses in a non-negotiable sea waybill stating that the carrier reserves the right to tranship will be disregarded.
People handling airfreight are aware of valuable consignments because every cargo shipment carries a waybill, which is similar to a passenger's boarding pass.
